name: Remember Me
original_name: ความรักเขียนด้วยความรัก
overview: Are you still able to recall those nostalgic days when you'd anxiously anticipate that much-awaited reply from the one you loved? Handwritten letters. MSN Messenger. Blackberry. LINE. Even though times have changed, messages have always allowed us to convey our feelings of love. But while communication helps bring us closer, does it also somehow deepen the distance between our hearts?

trailers.title: Remember Me | Official Trailer | Does messaging bring lovers closer or further apart?
